info.goodStarsLabel: Auspicious: One White, Six White, Eight White
info.badStarsLabel: Inauspicious: Two Black, Three Jade, Five Yellow, Seven Red

1.title: One White Star
1.desc: Boosts career, reputation, relationships and wealth; use water features appropriately.

2.title: Two Black Star
2.desc: Associated with illness and obstacles; keep the area quiet, avoid earth works; metal cures help.

3.title: Three Jade Star
3.desc: Prone to disputes and legal issues; avoid renovations; apply calm wood elements sparingly.

4.title: Four Green Star
4.desc: Supports study and creativity; ideal for children’s rooms and studies; gently enhance with wood.

5.title: Five Yellow Star
5.desc: A major inauspicious star; avoid disturbance and earth works; apply strong remedies.

6.title: Six White Star
6.desc: Benefits authority, travel and career; suitable for steady metal enhancements.

7.title: Seven Red Star
7.desc: Indicates theft and accidents; reduce sharp metal and strengthen safety.

8.title: Eight White Star
8.desc: The current wealth star; enhances prosperity; activate with earth elements.

9.title: Nine Purple Star
9.desc: Brings celebrations and future luck; good for festive activities and ambience.

q1.title: How accurate is Bazi analysis?
q1.answer: Based on traditional theory with modern algorithms. Results are for reference; combine with personal effort and reality.

q2.title: Does inaccurate birth time affect results?
q2.answer: Yes. Accuracy directly impacts charting and analysis. Provide the most accurate time; best within 1 hour.

q3.title: Difference between basic and useful elements analysis?
q3.answer: Basic covers charting and five-element distribution; useful elements digs into pattern and useful/taboo; fortune prediction analyzes specific periods.

q4.title: How to understand professional terms?
q4.answer: We explain terms in plain language. Use 'Chat with Report' for detailed consultation.

q5.title: Can I save the analysis report?
q5.answer: Yes. Click 'Save Report' to export as an image for keeping and sharing.

qa.improveA: Adjust study rhythm and timing based on the advice, keep a good mindset.
